title: U.S. Fast-Tracks Arms Deals Valued at $8.6 Billion to Mideast Partners
summary_full: The Persian Gulf countries and Israel have faced repeated Iranian attacks during the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran. The State Department move bypassed congressional review.
summary_public: The Persian Gulf countries and Israel have faced repeated Iranian attacks during the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran. The State Department move bypassed congressional review.

IL.label: negative
IL.evidence: Israel have faced repeated Iranian attacks
